items.title: API Design
items.description: Best practices for designing REST, gRPC, and GraphQL APIs including versioning, pagination, error handling, rate limiting, idempotency, and API gateway patterns.

items.title: API Security
items.description: Security patterns for REST and GraphQL APIs — input validation, mass assignment prevention, API keys, rate limiting, MLE for APIs, request signing, GraphQL security, and OWASP API Top 10.

items.title: AWS AppSync
items.description: AWS AppSync for DVA-C02. GraphQL API service, resolvers, data sources (DynamoDB, Lambda, RDS, HTTP), real-time subscriptions, caching, authorization modes, and comparison with API Gateway.

items.title: REST, gRPC & API Design
items.description: REST principles and constraints, gRPC and Protocol Buffers, GraphQL, API versioning, pagination, idempotency, and API design best practices.
